name: buck2
description: Local Buck2 fork maintenance helpers for the BuildBuddy-backed patch stack.

interface.longDescription: Use Buck2 for local workflows that maintain the Buck2 fork stack, create bazel-rbe-style merge commits, and validate stack prefixes with BuildBuddy Workflows.
defaultPrompt: Use $buck2-stack-maintainer to refresh the Buck2 fork stack.
Validate the Buck2 stack with BuildBuddy Workflows.
Check that fork/main has origin/main as its first parent.
